title: RPC Error
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 error with structured error.data fields. Common transport/runtime reasons include protocol_not_ready, invalid_payload, decoding_failed and compression_failed.

reason.description: Machine-readable reason such as invalid_params, protocol_not_ready, invalid_payload, decoding_failed or compression_failed

category.description: High-level category such as validation, network, auth or server

technical_message.description: Implementation-oriented message safe to log and inspect during integration
